title: Health check fails with 'Cannot GET' error
symptom: When the Cloud Run instance warms up, the health check returns 'Cannot GET /{path}' errors until n8n is fully ready.
not_this_if: Health check is configured for /metrics endpoint
root_cause: The /healthz/readiness endpoint may not fully reflect the readiness of n8n, as it primarily checks the database connection. During startup, n8n may not be fully operational, leading to the 'Cannot GET' error.
fix_steps: Set the N8N_METRICS environment variable to true
Change the startup probe to check the /metrics endpoint
Deploy the changes and monitor the health check response
agent_instruction: Update the startup probe to use the /metrics endpoint for health checks.
